name: Volunteer Experience Survey 2024
description: Annual survey of parkrun volunteers covering motivation, satisfaction, and suggestions for improvement.

name: Participant Wellbeing Survey Q3 2024
description: Quarterly survey on participant physical and mental wellbeing outcomes from parkrun participation.

name: Event Attendance Data 2024
description: Weekly attendance figures across all UK parkrun events throughout 2024.

name: New Participant Onboarding Survey
description: Survey of first-time parkrun participants covering discovery, experience and likelihood to return.

name: Community Impact Report 2023
description: Compiled annual impact report with qualitative and quantitative data on parkrun's community effect.

name: Run Director Feedback Survey
description: Targeted feedback from Run Directors on operational challenges, support needs, and ideas.
